impact: This advances the PP&D plan by proving process dependency graph fixtures fail closed before live crawl or authenticated DevHub automation: edges must reference known nodes, consequential and financial nodes are blocked by default, citations are mandatory, and private values cannot enter committed fixtures.
summary: Add fixture-first validation for PP&D requirement-to-process dependency graph guardrails.
target_task: Task checkbox-112: Task checkbox-107: Add validation for requirement-to-process dependency graph fixtures proving every edge has a known source node, every consequential or financial node is blocked by default, and missing citations or private values fail closed.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
